mapper.select:
SELECT c.COUPON_ID as couponId, c.COUPON_NAME as couponName, c.DISCOUNT_TYPE as discountType, c.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT as discountAmount, c.MIN_ORDER_AMOUNT as minOrderAmount, TO_CHAR(c.VALID_FROM, 'YYYY.MM.DD') as validFrom, TO_CHAR(c.VALID_UNTIL, 'YYYY.MM.DD') as validUntil, c.STATUS as status, c.PLATFORM_SHARE as platformShare, ct.TARGET_TYPE as targetType, ct.PLACE_ID as placeId, NVL(dl.DL_CNT, 0) as downloadCount, NVL(us.USE_CNT, 0) as useCount FROM TRIPAN.COUPON c
INNER JOIN TRIPAN.COUPON_TARGET ct ON c.COUPON_ID = ct.COUPON_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COUPON_ID, COUNT(MEMBER_COUPON_ID) as DL_CNT FROM TRIPAN.MEMBER_COUPON GROUP BY COUPON_ID ) dl ON c.COUPON_ID = dl.COUPON_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT mc.COUPON_ID, COUNT(cu.USAGE_ID) as USE_CNT FROM TRIPAN.MEMBER_COUPON mc INNER JOIN TRIPAN.COUPON_USAGE cu ON mc.MEMBER_COUPON_ID = cu.MEMBER_COUPON_ID WHERE cu.STATUS = 'USED' GROUP BY mc.COUPON_ID ) us ON c.COUPON_ID = us.COUPON_ID
WHERE ct.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId}
AND ct.TARGET_TYPE = 'ALL'
AND ct.PLACE_ID = #{searchPlaceId}
AND c.STATUS = #{status}
AND c.VALID_FROM >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND c.VALID_UNTIL <= TO_DATE(#{endDate} || ' 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND c.COUPON_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY c.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRIPAN.COUPON c INNER JOIN TRIPAN.COUPON_TARGET ct ON c.COUPON_ID = ct.COUPON_ID WHERE ct.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND c.STATUS = 'ACTIVE') as activeCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRIPAN.MEMBER_COUPON mc INNER JOIN TRIPAN.COUPON_TARGET ct ON mc.COUPON_ID = ct.COUPON_ID WHERE ct.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM mc.ISSUED_AT) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM SYSDATE) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM mc.ISSUED_AT) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE)) as monthDownloadCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRIPAN.COUPON_USAGE cu WHERE cu.PARTNER_ID = #{partnerId} AND cu.STATUS = 'USED' AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM cu.USED_AT) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM SYSDATE) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM cu.USED_AT) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE)) as monthUseCount FROM DUAL
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(COUPON_ID), 0) + 1 FROM TRIPAN.COUPON
INSERT INTO TRIPAN.COUPON ( COUPON_ID, COUPON_NAME, DISCOUNT_AMOUNT, VALID_FROM, VALID_UNTIL, PLATFORM_SHARE, PARTNER_SHARE, DISCOUNT_TYPE, STATUS, CREATED_AT, MIN_ORDER_AMOUNT, MAX_QUANTITY, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{couponId}, #{couponName}, #{discountAmount}, TO_DATE(#{validFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{validUntil}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 0, 100, #{discountType}, 'ACTIVE', SYSDATE, #{minOrderAmount}, #{maxQuantity}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TRIPAN.COUPON SET STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE COUPON_ID = #{couponId}
